{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221909072A1CFFB796E1FFC263E7"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618219033832162072","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本来是5颗星的！只是，这动不动就缺页断码的，很讨厌，就减了一颗星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773757920,"group_id":"7611096261185260606","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"千百药，炼九转，成金丹","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxIvERCAuRYeHtonOicugIU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"589751912771736","user_name":"九转成金丹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"589751912771736","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611096261185260606","book_info":{"abstract":"“纳什的陪练，把全明星零封了？！”
穿越2004，杜克成了纳什的私人陪练。
系统觉醒：只要训练就能无限成长！
半年后，队内单挑赛。
纳什好心推荐：“这孩子防守不错，让他试试。”
贾米森笑着接球：“ rookie，我让你三……”
啪！
球被生断！
杜克抬手三分，空心入网。
贾米森愣住：“巧合……”
下一秒——
抢断！抓帽！死亡缠绕！
5：0！
全明星前锋，被一个陪练剃了光头！
全场死寂。
诺维茨基瞪大眼睛：“这小子什么来路？”
纳什捂着脸：“……我好像培养了个怪物。”
库班当场拍板：“签他！立刻！”
杜克擦着汗，看向目瞪口呆的纳什：
“师父，说好的，带你夺冠。”
“现在——可以开始了。”
陪练半年，零封全明星。
NBA的噩梦，从达拉斯开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe3140f3952ef4f577daeee8a3bd7231b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无端五十玄","author_id":"","book_id":"7611096261185260606","book_name":"NBA：纳什陪练？零封贾米森！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611492889419317784","read_count":"17677","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"437254"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"99","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe3140f3952ef4f577daeee8a3bd7231b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361748&x-signature=hm9o12TVsdvcosz1DFNbIt5Cec4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1618096563425640","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221909072A1CFFB796E1FFC263E7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读41分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2480,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":162},"user_action":{"author":0,"
